build: mainnet v3 — uniform 1% protocol fee (bonding + post-graduation), 0.005 ETH graduation cap, graduates to REAL Uniswap V2 (DexScreener/bot-trackable), betaMode allowlist
supersedes: factory 0xfa5c740aec9d91cebdc9844e5ca6591f309a5dd2 / feeRouter 0x630216d06a54581e04c452892f69137e75ea45da (beta v2, 0.5% post-grad fee, 0.001 ETH cap — tokens created there stay on it)
notes: MAINNET v3. Uniform 1% protocol fee: 1% curve fee (bonding) AND 1% always-on fee post-graduation (PROTOCOL_FEE_BPS=100) — the platform takes 1% on every trade forever. Graduation cap 0.005 ETH so tokens graduate fast onto REAL Uniswap V2 (visible on DexScreener + bot-trackable). betaMode ON — only the allowlisted wallet creates/trades until setBetaMode(false). Admin/owner/treasury = the deployer 0xA49dc277 (this key was exposed during setup — ROTATE to a fresh/multisig before going public). Go public: factory.setBetaMode(false).
